ddls:
CREATE TABLE "auv_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "control_method" INTEGER /* Control method used to collect the data (e.g., autonomous, remote-controlled) */,
  "x_current" REAL /* Current x-coordinate of the AUV */,
  "x_desired" REAL /* Desired x-coordinate of the AUV */,
  "y_current" REAL /* Current y-coordinate of the AUV */,
  "y_desired" REAL /* Desired y-coordinate of the AUV */,
  "z_current" REAL /* Current z-coordinate of the AUV */,
  "z_desired" REAL /* Desired z-coordinate of the AUV */,
  "x_velocity_current" REAL /* Current x-velocity of the AUV */,
  "x_velocity_desired" REAL /* Desired x-velocity of the AUV */,
  "y_velocity_current" REAL /* Current y-velocity of the AUV */,
  "y_velocity_desired" REAL /* Desired y-velocity of the AUV */,
  "z_velocity_current" REAL /* Current z-velocity of the AUV */,
  "z_velocity_desired" REAL /* Desired z-velocity of the AUV */,
  "yaw_current" REAL /* Current yaw of the AUV */,
  "yaw_desired" REAL /* Desired yaw of the AUV */,
  "yaw_velocity_current" REAL /* Current yaw velocity of the AUV */,
  "yaw_velocity_desired" REAL /* Desired yaw velocity of the AUV */,
  "roll_current" REAL /* Current roll of the AUV */,
  "roll_desired" REAL /* Desired roll of the AUV */,
  "roll_velocity_current" REAL /* Current roll velocity of the AUV */,
  "roll_velocity_desired" REAL /* Desired roll velocity of the AUV */,
  "pitch_current" REAL /* Current pitch of the AUV */,
  "pitch_desired" REAL /* Desired pitch of the AUV */,
  "pitch_velocity_current" REAL /* Current pitch velocity of the AUV */,
  "pitch_velocity_desired" REAL /* Desired pitch velocity of the AUV */,
  "auv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the AUV */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mission */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sensor */,
  "anomaly_flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the data point is anomalous */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, questionable, bad) */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during data collection (e.g., stormy, calm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auv_data_auv_id FOREIGN KEY ("auv_id") REFERENCES auv_control ("auv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auv_data_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auv_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auv_data_control_method FOREIGN KEY ("control_method") REFERENCES auv_control ("control_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auv_state" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the state entry */,
  "x_current" REAL /* Current x-coordinate of the AUV */,
  "y_current" REAL /* Current y-coordinate of the AUV */,
  "z_current" REAL /* Current z-coordinate of the AUV */,
  "x_velocity_current" REAL /* Current x-velocity of the AUV */,
  "y_velocity_current" REAL /* Current y-velocity of the AUV */,
  "z_velocity_current" REAL /* Current z-velocity of the AUV */,
  "yaw_current" REAL /* Current yaw of the AUV */,
  "roll_current" REAL /* Current roll of the AUV */,
  "pitch_current" REAL /* Current pitch of the AUV */,
  "auv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the AUV */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mission */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during state entry */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Current battery level of the AUV */,
  "system_status" TEXT /* Status of the AUV's systems (e.g., operational, warning, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auv_state_auv_id FOREIGN KEY ("auv_id") REFERENCES auv_control ("auv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auv_state_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auv_state_x_current FOREIGN KEY ("x_current") REFERENCES auv_data ("x_current")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., temperature, salinity, depth) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last calibration */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor calibration (e.g., calibrated, needs calibration) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the installation */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auv_commands" (
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the command */,
  "command_type" TEXT /* Type of the command (e.g., move, stop, change depth) */,
  "command_value" REAL /* Value associated with the command (e.g., depth, velocity) */,
  "auv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the AUV */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user who issued the command */,
  "command_status" TEXT /* Status of the command execution (e.g., pending, executed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auv_commands_auv_id FOREIGN KEY ("auv_id") REFERENCES auv_control ("auv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auv_commands_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auv_control" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control method */,
  "control_method" TEXT /* Name of the control method (e.g., autonomous, remote-controlled) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the control method */,
  "auv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the AUV */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user who set the control method */,
  "control_status" TEXT /* Status of the control method (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auv_control_auv_id FOREIGN KEY ("auv_id") REFERENCES auv_control ("auv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auv_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, operator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the mission */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the mission */,
  "auv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the AUV */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user who created the mission */,
  "mission_status" TEXT /* Status of the mission (e.g., planned, in progress, completed, aborted) */,
  "mission_description" TEXT /* Description of the mission */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance covered during the mission */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed during the mission */,
  "max_depth" REAL /* Maximum depth reached during the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_auv_id FOREIGN KEY ("auv_id") REFERENCES auv_control ("auv_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auv_location" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the location entry */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X-coordinate of the AUV */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the AUV */,
  "z_coordinate" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the AUV */,
  "auv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the AUV */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user who recorded the location */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions at the location */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the AUV at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auv_location_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auv_location_auv_id FOREIGN KEY ("auv_id") REFERENCES auv_control ("auv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auv_location_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "auv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the AUV */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mission */,
  "anomaly_flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the reading is anomalous */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the reading (e.g., good, questionable, bad) */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_auv_id FOREIGN KEY ("auv_id") REFERENCES auv_control ("auv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_timestamp FOREIGN KEY ("timestamp") REFERENCES auv_data ("timestamp")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., temperature, salinity) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "auv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the AUV */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., ongoing, completed, failed) */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_auv_id FOREIGN KEY ("auv_id") REFERENCES auv_control ("auv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES auv_data ("data_id")
)
